case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JAMES DOE JONES

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, JAMES DOE JONES, BRAD DOE JONES, TOM DOE DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
